glosses.ja: 提供する; 供給する

translations.en: You’re providing the supporting document today.
translations.de: Du reichst den Nachweis heute ein.
translations.pt: Hoje você apresenta o documento comprobatório.
translations.vi: Hôm nay bạn nộp tài liệu chứng minh.
translations.nl: Vandaag lever je het bewijsstuk in.
translations.hi: आज आप सहायक दस्तावेज़ जमा कर रहे हैं.
translations.id: Hari ini kamu menyerahkan dokumen pendukung.
translations.sv: I dag lämnar du in den styrkande handlingen.
translations.ja: あなたは今日、証明書類を提出します。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; grammatical subject of the finite verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive, selecting a direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of the noun 'justificatif'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'fournis'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase, specifying the time of the action.

sentences.target: Nous fournissons les documents manquants ce matin.
sentences.reading: /nu fuʁnisɔ̃ le dɔkymɑ̃ mɑ̃kɑ̃ sə matɛ̃/

translations.fr: Nous fournissons les documents manquants ce matin.
translations.ipa: /nu fuʁnisɔ̃ le dɔkymɑ̃ mɑ̃kɑ̃ sə matɛ̃/
translations.en: We’re providing the missing documents this morning.
translations.es: Esta mañana entregamos los documentos que faltan.
translations.de: Wir reichen die fehlenden Unterlagen heute Morgen ein.
translations.it: Questa mattina presentiamo i documenti mancanti.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天早上提交缺失的文件。
translations.yue: 我哋今朝遞交欠缺嘅文件。
translations.ru: Мы сегодня утром предоставляем недостающие документы.
translations.pt: Hoje de manhã apresentamos os documentos faltantes.
translations.he: הבוקר אנחנו מגישים את המסמכים החסרים.
translations.vi: Sáng nay chúng tôi nộp các tài liệu còn thiếu.
translations.nl: Vanochtend leveren we de ontbrekende documenten in.
translations.uk: Сьогодні вранці ми подаємо відсутні документи.
translations.hu: Ma reggel benyújtjuk a hiányzó dokumentumokat.
translations.hi: आज सुबह हम बाकी दस्तावेज़ जमा कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σήμερα το πρωί προσκομίζουμε τα ελλείποντα έγγραφα.
translations.nb: I dag tidlig leverer vi de manglende dokumentene.
translations.id: Pagi ini kami menyerahkan dokumen yang kurang.
translations.sv: I dag på morgonen lämnar vi in de saknade handlingarna.
translations.ro: În această dimineață depunem documentele lipsă.
translations.da: Her til morgen afleverer vi de manglende dokumenter.
translations.ja: 今朝、私たちは不足している書類を提出します。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural; grammatical subject of the finite verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive, selecting a direct object.
Definite article, plural; determiner of the noun 'documents'.
Common noun, plural; head of the direct object noun phrase.
Adjective, masculine plural; post-nominal modifier agreeing with 'documents'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; introduces the temporal NP 'ce matin'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the temporal NP functioning as an adverbial modifier.

sentences.target: Merci de fournir une pièce d'identité.

translations.fr: Merci de fournir une pièce d'identité.
translations.es: Por favor, presenta un documento de identidad.
translations.de: Bitte legen Sie einen Ausweis vor.
translations.it: Per favore, presenta un documento d'identità.
translations.pt: Por favor, apresente um documento de identificação.
translations.vi: Vui lòng xuất trình giấy tờ tùy thân.
translations.hu: Kérjük, mutassa be a személyazonosító okmányt.
translations.ro: Vă rugăm să prezentați un act de identitate.
translations.ja: 身分証をご提示ください。

tokens.explanation: Interjection used as a polite directive formula; introduces the request.
Preposition governing an infinitive ('fournir') in the polite construction 'merci de + infinitif'.
Infinitive verb; complement of the preposition 'de', heading the requested action.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of the noun 'pièce'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of the infinitive 'fournir'.
Elided preposition 'de' before a vowel; introduces the noun complement 'identité'.
Common noun, feminine singular; complements 'pièce' via the preposition 'de' (i.e., 'pièce d'identité').

sentences.target: Le magasin fournit la facture par email.
sentences.reading: /lə magazɛ̃ fuʁni la faktyʁ paʁ imɛl/

translations.fr: Le magasin fournit la facture par email.
translations.ipa: /lə magazɛ̃ fuʁni la faktyʁ paʁ imɛl/
translations.en: The store provides the invoice by email.
translations.es: La tienda envía la factura por correo electrónico.
translations.de: Der Laden schickt die Rechnung per E-Mail.
translations.it: Il negozio invia la fattura via email.
translations.zh-Hans: 商店通过电子邮件发送发票。
translations.yue: 舖頭會用電郵發送發票。
translations.ru: Магазин отправляет счёт по электронной почте.
translations.pt: A loja envia a fatura por e-mail.
translations.vi: Cửa hàng gửi hóa đơn qua email.
translations.ar: المتجر يرسل الفاتورة عبر البريد الإلكتروني.
translations.nl: De winkel stuurt de factuur per e-mail.
translations.hu: A bolt e-mailben küldi a számlát.
translations.hi: दुकान बिल ईमेल से भेजती है.
translations.el: Το κατάστημα στέλνει το τιμολόγιο μέσω email.
translations.ja: 店は請求書をメールで送ります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of the noun 'magasin'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject NP.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, selecting a direct object and an oblique.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of the noun 'facture'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'fournit'.
Preposition introducing the means/instrument; heads the PP 'par email'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'par', specifying the medium.
